checklist.question: Selects correct tool for task? (pypdf for merge/split/rotate/encrypt, pdfplumber for text/table extraction, reportlab for PDF creation, qpdf for CLI operations, pytesseract for OCR scanned PDFs)
For scanned/image-based PDFs, uses OCR pipeline (pdf2image + pytesseract) — not pypdf/pdfplumber text extraction?
Never uses Unicode subscript/superscript characters in reportlab PDFs — uses <sub>/<super> tags in Paragraph or manual positioning on canvas?
For PDF form filling, follows the step-by-step process (check fillable fields → extract field info → fill with pypdf or reportlab overlay)?
Password protection uses pypdf encrypt() with both user and owner passwords, or qpdf --decrypt for removal?
Merge/split operations produce correct output — merge adds all pages from all inputs, split creates separate files per page/range?
Table extraction uses pdfplumber (not pypdf) and handles empty table checks before DataFrame conversion?
For non-fillable forms, uses reportlab overlay approach with coordinate estimation to place text at correct positions?
Estimates field coordinates using visual inspection (screenshot/PDF viewer) and positions text in points from bottom-left?
Verifies output after form filling by converting filled PDF to images?

stats.last_improvement: 2026-03-25: added inline PDF Form Filling section (fillable + non-fillable + verification), removed dangling FORMS.md/REFERENCE.md references, added CJK OCR lang param guidance
